data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a broad trough of low pressure, the weather over the coast of Guangdong will remain unsettled with showers and thunderstorms for the rest of this week to early next week. Showers will be heavy at times. With the broad trough of low pressure weakening in the middle and latter parts of next week and an anticyclone aloft covering Guangdong gradually, showers will ease off over the region, and the weather will become very hot.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260717","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers and a few squally thunderstorms.
